boundaries.AMBIGUOUS: withhold or question packet; not identity
boundaries.BLOCKED_BY_NON_CLAIM: claim exceeds authorized scope; not semantic payload failure
boundaries.REQUIRES_EXTRACTION: bounded extraction may be proposed; extraction is not performed
boundaries.REQUIRES_REVIEW: review is needed; approval is not granted
boundaries.SUPPORTED_LOCALLY: supported by local fixture evidence only; not true claim
boundaries.UNSUPPORTED_BY_AVAILABLE_EVIDENCE: not supported by available refs; not false claim
